content.en:
The power of the other side of the origin is the power of using the golden text of the other side and the black text of the other side to combine and fuse in a special way.

Now.

Ye Tian comprehended the power of the origin of the other side, and knew how to create the magic power of the other side.

That is, to use the power of the origin of the other side as a seed, integrate it into one's own body, and then create the magic of the other side.

If you fail, it will also bring great trauma to the body.

"Studying the power of the origin of the other side is just the beginning, and I am afraid that it will take even longer years to hope to create the magic power of the other side!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course.

He was not in a hurry, so he began to study for a long time.

The other side.

His method of the golden body on the other side also came to a standstill, mainly because the golden text on the other side of the master did not continue to increase.

Now, the five hundred or so golden texts on the other side of Gu Heng Mountain have all been mastered by him.

Therefore, he didn't have a new golden text on the other side, and the method of the golden body on the other side naturally couldn't continue to create.

"I'm already a sixth-level venerable envoy, and I still can't get in touch with more golden texts on the other side of Gu Heng Mountain, I'm afraid that only by becoming a venerable lord can I be qualified to get more golden texts on the other side. However, my cultivation is a hard wound, and it is impossible for me to become a Venerable Lord. "

Ye Tian was very aware of this, so it was a bit difficult to expect to get more golden inscriptions from Gu Heng Mountain.

this day.

He came to find the Lord of Mount Xun.

Nowadays, the lord of Xunshan has a higher status in Guheng Mountain.

In the past, he was only a fourth-level lord, but now he has become a fifth-level lord.

Ye Tian felt that it should have something to do with the land of the Haven Inheritance on the other side, otherwise he would not be able to be promoted.

......

"Lord of Endless, what's the matter?"

The Lord of Xunshan asked.

"Lord of Xunshan, I want to ask, how can there be a place for the inheritance of golden texts on the other side?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Why, our Gu Heng Mountain has about five hundred golden inscriptions on the other side, isn't it enough for you to comprehend?" said the Lord of Xunshan with a smile.

"Lord of Xunshan, I have already mastered all the five hundred golden texts on the other side!" Ye Tian said.

"You've got it all ???"

The Lord of Mount Xun was surprised.

Ye Tian didn't have a long time to join Gu Heng Mountain, so he had mastered about five hundred golden texts on the other side, and his comprehension was too high!

"Lord of Endless, you should also be able to guess that Gu Hengshan must be more than this Golden Text on the other side, but you are not a Venerable Lord, and you can't comprehend more Golden Texts on the other side. A long time ago, the bone transformation realm of hostile forces infiltrated into Guheng Mountain, comprehended a lot of Jinwen on the other side, and then brought the Jinwen on the other side to other forces. The other party even publicized this matter, which made Gu Hengshan lose face. "

Therefore, since then, there is no position of honorable lord, and there is no way to get in touch with more Jinwen on the other side. Therefore, I can't let you go to the other side of the Golden Text. "

The Lord of Xunshan then said: "If you want to go to the land of the inheritance of the golden text on the other side, it is difficult to be honest, the place of the inheritance of the golden text on the other side is too rare, and we do not have a place of the inheritance of the golden text on the other side of the ancient Heng Mountain, otherwise you would have already been allowed to go to enlightenment." Not only do we not have it, but the Ancient Demon Sea and Taidu Realm do not have a place for the inheritance of golden texts on the other side, only the True Beast Alliance has a place for the inheritance of golden texts on the other side, and the number of golden texts on the other side does not seem to be much, and we don't know how much. "

"True Beast Alliance, the land that owns the inheritance of the golden text on the other side?"

Ye Tian was taken aback.

He really doesn't know the secret!

"Yes!" the Lord of Xunshan affirmed, "This is recognized news, and there are even forces that want to snatch the Golden Inheritance Land on the other side of the True Beast Alliance, but they have failed!"

After learning this secret, Ye Tian had an idea in his heart.

After retiring from the Lord of Xunshan, he began to think about planning the other side of the True Beast Alliance.

"My Eternal Great Ape Vest might be able to do it!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The Eternal Great Ape Clan is also the Eternal True Beast Clan, a subordinate True Beast race belonging to the True Beast Alliance.

Now, he also knew that the Eternal Great Ape Clan had a recommended place to join the True Beast Alliance.

For example, those eight bone transformation realms of the Eternal Giant Ape Clan are members of the True Beast Alliance.

It's just that the Eternal Giant Ape Clan also has a different mind, wanting to occupy the land of the Haven inheritance on the other side and increase their own strength, and they don't want to increase the strength of other Eternal True Beasts, so they didn't report to the True Beast Alliance.

Otherwise, the place where the Haven Inheritance on the other side would not be able to take the turn of Gu Heng Mountain at all.

From this aspect, it can also be seen that the True Beast Alliance is not united at all.

But no one dared to provoke the True Beast Alliance, because there were too many Eternal True Beasts in the Bone Transformation Realm in the True Beast Alliance, even if Gu Hengshan and the True Beast Alliance were fighting, the Bone Transformation Realm level would definitely not be able to fight.

......

The Eternal Great Apes.

Now.

Ye Tian's Eternal Giant Ape Clan had immediately raised his cultivation to the Fifth Bone Transformation Realm, and he had also comprehended the other Horizontal Texts of the Eternal Giant Ape Clan, which made those Eight Bone Transformation Realm Eternal Giant Ape Immortals value him very much.

"Next, let this Eternal Giant Ape immediately master a technique on the other side, so that the Eternal Giant Ape Clan should value me even more. When the time comes, I apply to join the True Beast Alliance, and they should agree!"

"As long as you join the True Beast Alliance, you can hope to enter the land of the Golden Inheritance on the other side!"

A few more primeval eras have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's Eternal Giant Ape Horse Armor showed those eighth-stage bone transformation realm Eternal Giant Ape that he had created the technique of the other side.

The news immediately shocked them.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian said that he wanted to join the True Beast Alliance, and these Eternal Giant Apes agreed without even thinking about it.

They also want some clansmen to join the True Beast Alliance, so that the Eternal Giant Ape Clan's status in the True Beast Alliance can become higher and higher, and suppress the other Eternal True Beast Clan!

Soon.

Under the arrangement of these Eternal Giant Ape powerhouses, Ye Tian successfully joined the True Beast Alliance.

The headquarters of the True Beast Alliance is located here in the Eternal Mountains, and some members of each Eternal True Beast Clan have built a stronghold here.

And the Eternal Great Ape clan also has a stronghold, and some of the Eternal Great Apes stay here.

And if you want to enter the core position of the True Beast Alliance, you must have enough strength, and he is far from qualified now.

After entering the True Beast Alliance, he continued to learn about the situation, such as learning about the inheritance land on the other side.

Only after understanding it, can he hope to enter the land of inheritance on the other side!

Eventually, he inquired about entering the land of inheritance on the other side.

According to the information, any member of the True Beast Alliance is eligible to enter the inheritance land on the other side, but only if he obtains 100,000 contribution points can he buy a place, otherwise, no one can go.
